signals.headline: XRP Commodity Reclassification & ETF Inflows | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
XRP Commodity Reclassification & ETF Inflows | YES | MED confidence**  
SEC and CFTC reclassified XRP as a commodity (March 17 ruling), enabling institutional products; Fidelity added XRP to its digital commodity index, with seven spot ETFs holding $1B+ AUM and $119.6M-$132M weekly net inflows.[3] Franklin Templeton highlights this as a market structure shift, with CLARITY Act markup expected late
